LanguageData.VFED_DeserterShuttle.description: A spacer-tech shuttle designed for transit between surface and orbit, or between moons of a planetary system.
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterShuttle.label: deserter shuttle
LanguageData.VFED_FlagshipChunk.description: A chunk of an imperial flagship. It seems to have been torn off by some kind of powerful weapon.\n\nHaving landed not long ago, it still contains useful resources which you can acquire by deconstructing it.
LanguageData.VFED_FlagshipChunk.label: flagship chunk
